channel.title: Rahul Gupta — Writing
channel.description: Essays on enterprise AI, modernization, payments, and the economics of technology.

item.title: Evolution for Enterprises from AI to GenAI
item.description: The difference between traditional AI and generative AI, a four-step enterprise adoption playbook, and use cases across healthcare, financial services, contact centers, transportation, and HR.

item.title: The Role of AI and ML in Modernizing Legacy Systems
item.description: Five ways AI and ML extend the life and value of legacy systems — predictive maintenance, process automation, analytics on trapped data, customer experience, and real-time security.

item.title: Revolutionizing Real-Time Payments
item.description: The evolution from batch processing to instant, irrevocable transfers — and what implementation actually requires: infrastructure, security, and regulatory collaboration.

item.title: The Day You Fired Your Servers and Hired Cloud
item.description: Why the move off on-premises servers pays, where migrations go wrong, and how to sequence one — from a leader who took a $6B enterprise from under 10% cloud to 70%+.

item.title: Key Trends in Technology Transformation
item.description: The five forces reshaping enterprise technology — AI/ML, cloud, cybersecurity, IoT and edge computing, and blockchain — and why staying ahead of them is a business imperative.

item.title: Optimizing Technology Spend: Strategies for Success
item.description: Four disciplines for getting more from every technology dollar — audit, prioritization, cloud economics, and automation — from the leader who saved ~$400M from a $1.45B budget.
